79919785.title: 2025–26 Swindon Town F.C. season

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: 147th season in existence of Swindon Town FC

79919785.description: 147th season in existence of Swindon Town FC
79919785.extract: The 2025–26 season is the 147th season in the history of Swindon Town Football Club and their fifth consecutive season in League Two. In addition to the domestic league, the club would also participate in the FA Cup, the EFL Cup, and the EFL Trophy.
